Question: What are the designed uses for this model?
UC1_Llama Doctor 3B Finetuning: Conversational AI / chatbots, text generation, instruction following, medical consultation tools, content creation, problem-solving assistants.
UC2_Prithvi Crop Classification Finetuni: Remote sensing image segmentation for crop type classification, burn scar segmentation, flood mapping, land cover classification; supports multi-temporal satellite imagery.
UC3_Llama 3.2 PII Redactor LoRA: Redacting PII in English text, replacing detected spans with placeholder labels (e.g., [FIRSTNAME], [EMAIL]); intended for downstream processing or audit pipelines.
UC4_Nemotron Cascade 2 Alignment: General-purpose reasoning and agentic tasks; math (IMO/AIME gold medal level), competitive programming, instruction following, tool use, software engineering, multilingual tasks; supports thinking and instruct modes.
UC5_Phishing Detection DistilBERT: Multi-label classification of emails and URLs as legitimate or phishing; applicable to email filtering, cybersecurity threat detection, phishing URL detection.

Question: Are the performance shown in the pretrained version improved in the finetuning?
UC1_Llama Doctor 3B Finetuning: The finetuned model (Llama-Doctor) is optimized for medical/healthcare dialogue and instruction following on the chat_doctor dataset, enhancing performance in that specific domain compared to the general-purpose pretrained Llama 3.2 3B base.
UC2_Prithvi Crop Classification Finetuni: The finetuned model achieves mIoU of 0.4269 and mAcc of 64.06% on multi-temporal crop classification — representing domain-specific improvement over the general MAE pre-training objective of the base Prithvi model.
UC3_Llama 3.2 PII Redactor LoRA: The finetuned PII redactor achieves micro-F1 ~0.90 and exact match ~0.67 on PII redaction tasks — a domain-specific capability not present in the general-purpose pretrained Llama 3.2 3B base.
UC4_Nemotron Cascade 2 Alignment: Yes — the finetuned openNemo Cascade achieves gold medal on IMO 2025 (35 pts) and IOI 2025 (439.3 pts), AIME 2025 92.4%, and strong scores across math, code, and alignment benchmarks, substantially outperforming the Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B base on most tasks.
UC5_Phishing Detection DistilBERT: Yes — the finetuned model achieves 99.58% accuracy and F1-score of 99.579 on phishing detection, vastly outperforming the general-purpose pretrained DistilBERT which has no phishing detection capability.
